title: Senior Software Engineer - Patni Computer Systems - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Patni Computer Systems - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Patni Computer Systems. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Patni Computer Systems:
Patni Computer Systems is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems!
